{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Indirial's sword
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Indirial]] possesses a chipped [[sword]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c21">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Indirial]] pulls a cracked and pitted [[sword]] from midair.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c21">''City of Light'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
